Emily Johnson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated customer service representative with over 5 years of experience in retail and warehouse environments. Proven ability to manage inventory and assist customers effectively. Seeking to leverage my skills in a new role, although I have limited experience with forklift operations.

Experience
Customer Service Representative  
Best Buy, Atlanta, GA  
June 2020 - Present  
- Assisted customers with product inquiries and returns, ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.  
- Managed stock levels and organized merchandise on the sales floor.  
- Collaborated with team members to improve store layout and presentation.

Warehouse Associate  
FedEx Ground, Atlanta, GA  
March 2018 - May 2020  
- Supported daily operations by unloading and sorting packages in a fast-paced environment.  
- Operated pallet jacks and hand trucks to move goods around the warehouse.  
- Maintained cleanliness and organization of the warehouse space.  

Intern  
Office Depot, Atlanta, GA  
June 2017 - August 2017  
- Assisted in inventory management and data entry for stock levels.  
- Helped customers with purchases and provided product recommendations.  

Certifications
